name: Carlin Gold Corp.
description: Carlin Gold Corp. is a Canada-based exploration stage activity company. The Company is focused on the acquisition and exploration of gold properties in Nevada and Yukon, Canada. The Company's projects include Cortez Summit, Javelina, and Yukon Joint Venture. The Cortez Summit property consists of 142 unpatented lode claims located in Eureka County, Nevada. The Javelina property consists of 14 unpatented lode claims located in Eureka County, Nevada.
